definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I like coffee, but I prefer tea.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: I like coffee, but I prefer tea.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to introduce a phrase or clause contrasting with what has already been said.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to introduce a phrase or clause contrasting with what has already been said.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: If it rains, I will stay home.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: If it rains, I will stay home.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to introduce a condition (something that must happen first).
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to introduce a condition (something that must happen first).]
